# MyBusinessFeedback
> A simple, thoughtful way for businesses to hear from their customers after every service. Built for teams that take customer experience seriously.

## Product
- [How It Works](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/how-it-works/): Learn how My Business Feedback helps your team collect structured customer feedback in three simple steps. Send, listen, act.
- [Pricing](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/pricing/): Custom pricing built around your business. Talk to our team about a feedback system tailored to how you work.
- [FAQ](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/faq/): Answers to common questions about My Business Feedback. Learn about setup, pricing, privacy, and how structured customer feedback works for your business.

## Use cases
- [Client Feedback for Law Firms](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/for-law-firms/): A structured feedback system designed around how legal matters close. Built for law firms that want to hear from every client after every case.
- [Client Feedback for Med Spas](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/for-med-spas/): A structured feedback system designed for med spas. Hear from every client after every treatment so you can improve outcomes and build lasting relationships.
- [Customer Feedback for Home Services](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/for-home-services/): A structured feedback system built for home service businesses. Hear from every customer after every job so you can improve service and build your reputation.
- [Customer Feedback for Service Businesses](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/for-service-businesses/): Structured feedback that fits how service businesses actually run. Built for teams that turn every job into a lasting relationship.
- [Patient Feedback for Dental Practices](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/for-dental-practices/): A structured feedback system built for dental practices. Listen to every patient after every appointment so you can improve care and strengthen relationships.
- [Patient Feedback for Medical Practices](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/for-medical-practices/): Respectful, compliant patient feedback that strengthens your practice. Built for medical teams that want to listen to every patient.

## Locations
- [Business Feedback Solutions in Atlanta, GA](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/locations/atlanta/): Structured feedback for law firms, medical practices, dental practices, med spas, and service businesses in Atlanta, GA. Based in San Diego, serving businesses nationwide.

## Company
- [About](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/about/): My Business Feedback is built by Nexus Multimedia, a San Diego digital marketing agency. We help businesses collect structured customer feedback and act on it.
- [Partner with Us](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/partner-with-us/): Tell us about your business and we'll set up a custom feedback system for your team. Built by Nexus Multimedia.
- [Fem Women's Health](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/femwomenshealth/): A short note on your experience with Fem Women's Health.

## Blog
- [Why client retention in a med spa starts with the feedback loop](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/med-spa-client-retention-feedback/): Client retention in aesthetic medicine depends on understanding the full experience, not just the clinical result. Here is how a structured feedback loop changes the relationship.
- [The post-treatment conversation most med spas never have](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/post-treatment-conversation-med-spas-miss/): After every treatment there is a window where clients have the clearest perspective on their experience. Most med spas never ask. Here is why that window matters and how to use it.
- [The post-job feedback system contractors overlook](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/post-job-feedback-contractors-hvac-plumbers/): Most contractors close a job and move on. A simple post-job feedback system catches problems early, strengthens customer relationships, and drives repeat business.
- [How structured patient feedback drives growth in a dental practice](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/patient-feedback-dental-practice-growth/): Dental practices that collect structured feedback after every appointment see measurable improvements in retention, referrals, and team performance. Here is the full picture.
- [Customer feedback in home services: what to ask after every job](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/customer-feedback-home-service-businesses/): Home service businesses that collect structured feedback after every job find problems faster, retain more customers, and build stronger reputations. Here is how to do it well.
- [Closing the loop after every hygiene visit](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/hygiene-visit-feedback-loop-dental/): The hygiene visit is the most frequent touchpoint in a dental practice. Collecting patient feedback after every cleaning reveals patterns that directly affect retention and referrals.
- [Why Great Service Still Needs a Feedback System](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/feedback-system-even-when-doing-well/): Silent churn is the biggest threat to businesses that already deliver great service. A structured feedback system catches operational drift before it becomes a problem.
- [Why Client Communication Is the Real Retention Tool for Law Firms](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/client-communication-retention-law-firms/): Law firms that build structured client communication into their workflow retain more clients, earn more referrals, and catch problems before they escalate. Here is how.
- [What Patient Satisfaction Really Measures in a Modern Practice](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/patient-satisfaction-modern-practice/): Traditional patient satisfaction metrics like NPS and CAHPS miss the operational signals that matter most. Learn how structured, moment-based feedback generates actionable insight for modern practices.
- [The Post-Case Conversation Most Law Firms Skip](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/post-case-conversation-law-firms-miss/): Most law firms close matters but never close the loop with their clients. That silence costs referrals, repeat business, and insight into how the firm is actually performing.
- [The Difference Between Feedback You Can Act On and Feedback You Can't](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/actionable-vs-unactionable-feedback/): Most businesses collect feedback that generates noise, not signal. Learn how to structure questions so the answers point to something your team can actually change.
- [How to Build a Customer Communication System That Scales With Your Business](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/customer-communication-system-scales/): Going from ad-hoc to systematic customer feedback as your business grows. A practical playbook for what to measure, who owns it, and how to route insight to the right people.
- [How Top-Performing Firms Turn Client Feedback Into Referral Pipelines](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/client-feedback-referral-pipelines/): The best law firms do not chase referrals. They create conditions where satisfied clients naturally recommend them. Structured feedback is the mechanism that makes it work.
- [Building a HIPAA-Compliant Patient Feedback Loop That Actually Works](https://mybusinessfeedback.com/blog/hipaa-patient-feedback-loop/): HIPAA does not prevent you from collecting patient feedback. It shapes how you do it. Here is a practical guide to building a compliant, ongoing feedback channel for your practice.
